name: State Highway Patrol
description_short: State Highway Patrol Federal Credit Union (SHPFCU) is a credit union serving law enforcement officers with banking, lending, and savings products including auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards.
description_long:
State Highway Patrol Federal Credit Union (SHPFCU) is a federally chartered credit union with routing number 244077899, operating at https://www.patrolcu.com/. The institution serves members of the State Highway Patrol and related law enforcement communities, positioning itself as a member-owned financial cooperative.

SHPFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial services including online and mobile banking, auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, savings accounts, and ATM/shared branching access. Members can perform standard banking functions such as fund transfers, bill payments, and account management through digital channels. The credit union provides a "Save to Win" savings product that gamifies savings by offering cash prize drawings for account growth. They also partner with GreenPath Financial Wellness to offer free financial counseling services covering topics like student loans, budgeting, and debt management plans.

What distinguishes SHPFCU is its specialization in serving sworn law enforcement officers. The credit union offers exclusive benefits including a "Killed in the Line of Duty" debt cancellation benefit—a special coverage that eliminates loan balances at no cost to borrowers who are sworn law enforcement officers killed in the line of duty. This member-focused benefit reflects the institution's specific mission and community orientation.

As a credit union, SHPFCU operates as a not-for-profit member-owned institution rather than a shareholder-focused bank. The company provides no-surcharge ATM access and shared branching options, standard advantages of credit union membership. Contact options include phone support at (614) 431-0784 or (800) 282-3006, email at admin@patrolcu.com, and live chat functionality on their website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online and mobile banking with fund transfers and bill payment
Auto loans with specialized terms for members
Home mortgages for purchase and refinance
Save to Win savings account with cash prize drawings
ATM access and shared branching network
Killed in the Line of Duty debt cancellation benefit for sworn officers
Free financial counseling through GreenPath Financial Wellness partnership
Account enrollment and online account management
Loan officer consultations for product details and customization
pros: Exclusive debt cancellation benefit for sworn law enforcement officers killed in the line of duty—rare and member-centric offering
Free financial counseling through partnership with GreenPath Financial Wellness for debt management and budgeting
Save to Win savings account offers cash prize drawings for regular savers—incentivizes savings behavior
No-surcharge ATM access and shared branching network—reduces banking fees for members
Comprehensive digital banking including online and mobile platforms for account management and bill payment
Multiple contact channels: phone (614-431-0784 / 800-282-3006), email, and live chat support
Full-service lending options including auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards for member needs
cons: Limited to law enforcement community—membership eligibility restricted compared to mainstream banks
Website content does not specify loan terms, APR ranges, credit card benefits, or mortgage rates for transparency comparison
No information provided about account fees, minimum balances, or other account requirements
No details on mobile app features, online security measures, or fraud protection specifics
Limited geographic footprint information—unclear how many physical branches or service areas exist beyond routing number reference
best_for: Current and retired State Highway Patrol officers seeking law enforcement-focused banking and lending
Sworn law enforcement professionals who value exclusive member benefits like debt cancellation coverage
Savers interested in gamified savings products with prize incentives like Save to Win accounts
Credit union members seeking free financial counseling and debt management planning assistance
diagnosis: SHPFCU is best for sworn law enforcement officers and their families seeking specialized banking with exclusive member benefits, particularly the unique debt cancellation coverage. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted to the law enforcement community, and the website lacks transparent pricing/rate information needed for detailed service comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
